Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me analyze this event log carefully First Ill look at each case individually to see which activities repeat Case C001 Verify Documents appears twice Case C002 Call Customer appears twice Case C003 Verify Documents appears twice

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activities that appear multiple times within at least one case Verify Documents in C001 and C003 Call Customer in C002

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Verify Documents First Initial Document Verification or Verify Initial Documents Second Reverify Documents or Verify Updated Documents or Verify Additional Documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Triggers for second verification In C001 after Submit Additional customer uploaded ID scan In C003 after Adjust Account

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Alternative approach look at the phase of the process First verification initial processing Second verification follow up or resolution But this loses some context Maybe better to have more specific names

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Final renaming scheme For Verify Documents First occurrence Initial Document Verification Subsequent after additional Verify Additional Documents after adjustment Verify Documents After Adjustment For Call Customer based on purpose Request Missing Documents Call Clarification Call Confirmation Call Customer Recall Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This renaming ensures that each activity name reflects its specific role disambiguating instances that previously shared the same name but had different contexts
